remarks: Welcome to 59 Rock Spring Road, Unit 25 - an exceptional end-unit townhouse offering the perfect combination of comfort, style, and convenience in one of Stamford's most desirable locations.  This beautifully updated home features 3 generously sized bedrooms, 3 full bathrooms, and a powder room, providing a spacious and functional layout for everyday living. The renovated kitchen is thoughtfully designed with modern finishes and opens seamlessly to the main dining and living areas, creating an ideal space for both entertaining and daily life. Updated bathrooms throughout the home add a fresh, contemporary touch. The finished lower level, complete with a full bathroom, offers incredible versatility and can easily serve as a family room, home office, fitness space, playroom, or private guest suite. As an end unit, the home enjoys natural light, added privacy, and the convenience of an attached garage.  Ideally situated just minutes from shopping, dining, parks, schools, Metro-North, and major commuter routes, this move-in-ready home offers the perfect balance of peaceful living and everyday convenience. A rare opportunity to enjoy low-maintenance living in a prime Stamford location.
